explanation: The original command is modified by using double quotes around the command string and escaping the variable assignment with a backslash. This uses insertion and safe string formatting to maintain functionality.
The command is slightly altered by using a backtick to split 'Get-AudioDevice' into 'G`et-AudioDevice' to test parsing resilience while maintaining the same behavior.
The command is simplified by removing unnecessary string concatenation and using a direct variable assignment for the function name. This uses omission and substitution techniques.
The command is encoded using Base64 to test encoded command detection. This uses recoding/encoding techniques to simulate obfuscation.
The command is restructured by using a pipeline instead of variable assignment and removes the explicit -Seconds parameter. This uses reordering and omission techniques.
